breaking-swipe.flavor: The user swings its tough tail wildly and attacks opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Attack stats.

temper-flare.flavor: Spurred by desperation, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

fly.effect: User flies high into the air, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.
fly.flavor: The user flies up into the sky on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.

fissure.flavor: The user opens up a fissure in the ground and drops the target in. The target faints instantly if this attack hits.

sandstorm.effect: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.
sandstorm.flavor: A five-turn sandstorm is summoned to damage all Pokémon except Rock, Ground, and Steel types. The sandstorm also boosts the Sp. Def stats of Rock types.

steel-wing.effect: Has a 10% chance to raise the user’s Defense by one stage.
steel-wing.flavor: The target is hit with wings of steel. This may also boost the user's Defense stat.

twister.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
twister.flavor: The user whips up a vicious tornado to tear at opposing Pokémon. This may also make them flinch.

blaze-kick.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit and a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
blaze-kick.flavor: The user launches a kick that has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit. This may also leave the target with a burn.

blast-burn.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
blast-burn.flavor: The target is razed by a fiery explosion. The user can't move on the next turn.

roost.effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.
roost.flavor: The user lands and rests its body. This move restores the user's HP by up to half its max HP.

tailwind.effect: For three turns, friendly Pokémon have doubled Speed.
tailwind.flavor: The user whips up a turbulent whirlwind that boosts the Speed stats of itself and its allies for four turns.

air-slash.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
air-slash.flavor: The user attacks with a blade of air that slices even the sky. This may also make the target flinch.

defog.effect: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage.  Removes field effects from the enemy field.
defog.flavor: A strong wind blows away the target's barriers such as Reflect or Light Screen. This also lowers the target's evasiveness.

ominous-wind.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise all of the user’s stats by one stage.
ominous-wind.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

sky-drop.effect: Carries the target high into the air, dodging all attacks against either, and drops it next turn.
sky-drop.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

heat-crash.effect: Power is higher when the user weighs more than the target, up to a maximum of 120.
heat-crash.flavor: The user slams into the target with its flame-covered body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move's power.

hurricane.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
hurricane.flavor: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind. This may also confuse the target.

mystical-fire.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
mystical-fire.flavor: The user attacks by breathing a special, hot fire. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

brutal-swing.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
brutal-swing.flavor: The user swings its body around violently to inflict damage on everything in its vicinity.

scale-shot.effect: Boosts the user’s Speed and lowers their Defense by one stage after inflicting damage two to five times in a row.
scale-shot.flavor: The user attacks by shooting scales two to five times in a row. This move boosts the user's Speed stat but lowers its Defense stat.

dual-wingbeat.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
dual-wingbeat.flavor: The user slams the target with its wings to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

scorching-sands.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
scorching-sands.flavor: The user throws scorching sand at the target to attack. This may also leave the target with a burn.

dragon-cheer.flavor: The user raises its allies’ morale with a draconic cry so that their future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits. This rouses Dragon types more.

ice-punch.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target.
ice-punch.flavor: The target is attacked with an icy punch. This may also leave the target frozen.

tail-whip.effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage.
tail-whip.flavor: The user wags its tail cutely, making opposing Pokémon less wary. This lowers their Defense stats.

mist.effect: Protects the user’s stats from being changed by enemy moves.
mist.flavor: The user cloaks itself and its allies in a white mist that prevents any of their stats from being lowered for five turns.

water-gun.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
water-gun.flavor: The target is blasted with a forceful shot of water.

hydro-pump.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
hydro-pump.flavor: The target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.

surf.effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Dive users.
surf.flavor: The user attacks everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.

ice-beam.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target.
ice-beam.flavor: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy. This may also leave the target frozen.

blizzard.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target.
blizzard.flavor: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike opposing Pokémon. This may also leave the opposing Pokémon frozen.

bubble-beam.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
bubble-beam.flavor: A spray of bubbles is forcefully ejected at the target. This may also lower the target's Speed stat.

confusion.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
confusion.flavor: The target is hit with a weak telekinetic force to inflict damage. This may also confuse the target.

withdraw.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.
withdraw.flavor: The user withdraws its body into its hard shell, boosting its Defense stat.

haze.effect: Resets all Pokémon’s stats, accuracy, and evasion.
haze.flavor: The user creates a haze that eliminates every stat change among all the Pokémon engaged in battle.

waterfall.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
waterfall.flavor: The user charges at the target and may make it flinch.

bubble.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
bubble.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

flail.effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.
flail.flavor: The user flails about aimlessly to attack. The less HP the user has, the greater the move's power.

foresight.effect: Forces the target to have no Evade, and allows it to be hit by Normal and Fighting moves even if it’s a Ghost.
foresight.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

icy-wind.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
icy-wind.flavor: The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. This also lowers opposing Pokémon's Speed stats.

rollout.effect: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, resetting after five turns.
rollout.flavor: The user continually rolls into the target over five turns. This attack becomes more powerful each time it hits.

rapid-spin.effect: Frees the user from binding moves, removes Leech Seed, and blows away Spikes.
rapid-spin.flavor: The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.

rain-dance.effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.
rain-dance.flavor: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

mirror-coat.effect: Inflicts twice the damage the user received from the last special hit it took.
mirror-coat.flavor: A retaliatory attack that counters any special move, inflicting double the damage taken.

whirlpool.effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle and inflicts 1/16 its max HP in damage for 2-5 turns.
whirlpool.flavor: The user traps the target inside a violent, swirling whirlpool that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

fake-out.effect: Can only be used as the first move after the user enters battle.  Causes the target to flinch.
fake-out.flavor: This attack hits first and makes the target flinch. It works only on the first turn each time the user enters battle.

hail.effect: Changes the weather to a hailstorm for five turns.
hail.flavor: The user summons a hailstorm lasting five turns. It damages all Pokémon except Ice types.

yawn.effect: Target sleeps at the end of the next turn.
yawn.flavor: The user lets loose a huge yawn that lulls the target into falling asleep on the next turn.

refresh.effect: Cleanses the user of a burn, paralysis, or poison.
refresh.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

dive.effect: User dives underwater, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.
dive.flavor: The user dives on the first turn, then floats up and attacks on the next turn.

mud-sport.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

water-spout.effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has more HP remaining, with a maximum of 150 power.
water-spout.flavor: The user spouts water to damage opposing Pokémon. The lower the user's HP, the lower the move's power.

muddy-water.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
muddy-water.flavor: The user attacks by shooting muddy water at opposing Pokémon. This may also lower their accuracy.

iron-defense.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.
iron-defense.flavor: The user hardens its body's surface like iron, sharply boosting its Defense stat.

mud-shot.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
mud-shot.flavor: The user attacks by hurling a blob of mud at the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

water-pulse.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
water-pulse.flavor: The user attacks the target with a pulsing blast of water. This may also confuse the target.

gyro-ball.effect: Power raises when the user has lower Speed, up to a maximum of 150.
gyro-ball.flavor: The user tackles the target with a high-speed spin. The slower the user is than the target, the greater the move's power.

brine.effect: Has double power against Pokémon that have less than half their max HP remaining.
brine.flavor: This move's power is doubled if the target's HP is at half or less.

aqua-ring.effect: Restores 1/16 of the user’s max HP each turn.
aqua-ring.flavor: The user envelops itself in a veil made of water. It regains some HP every turn.

aura-sphere.flavor: The user lets loose a pulse of aura power from deep within its body at the target. This attack never misses.

aqua-tail.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
aqua-tail.flavor: The user attacks by swinging its tail as if it were a vicious wave in a raging storm.

zen-headbutt.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
zen-headbutt.flavor: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the target. This may also make the target flinch.

aqua-jet.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
aqua-jet.flavor: The user lunges at the target to inflict damage, moving at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

scald.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
scald.flavor: The user attacks by shooting boiling hot water at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

shell-smash.effect: Raises user’s Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by two stages.  Lower user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage.
shell-smash.flavor: The user breaks its shell, which lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

water-pledge.effect: With Grass Pledge, halves opposing Pokémon’s Speed for four turns.
water-pledge.flavor: A column of water hits the target. When used with its fire counterpart, this move's power is boosted and a rainbow appears.

liquidation.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
liquidation.flavor: The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

life-dew.flavor: The user scatters mysterious water around and restores the HP of itself and its ally Pokémon currently in the battle.

flip-turn.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flip-turn.flavor: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

wave-crash.flavor: The user shrouds itself in water and slams into the target with its whole body to inflict damage. This also damages the user quite a lot.

ice-spinner.flavor: The user covers its feet in thin ice and twirls around, slamming into the target. This move's spinning motion also destroys the terrain.

chilling-water.flavor: The user attacks the target by showering it with water that's so cold it saps the target's power. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

hydro-cannon.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
hydro-cannon.flavor: The target is hit with a watery blast. The user can't move on the next turn.

signal-beam.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
signal-beam.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

dark-pulse.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
dark-pulse.flavor: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with ill intent. This may also make the target flinch.

avalanche.effect: Inflicts double damage if the user takes damage before attacking this turn.
avalanche.flavor: This move's power is doubled if the target has inflicted damage on the user in the same turn.

flash-cannon.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
flash-cannon.flavor: The user gathers all its light energy and releases it at once. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

smack-down.effect: Removes any immunity to Ground damage.
smack-down.flavor: The user throws a stone or similar projectile to attack the target. If the target is in the air, it will be knocked down to the ground.

body-press.flavor: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user's Defense stat, the greater the damage this move deals.

bug-bite.effect: If target has a berry, inflicts double damage and uses the berry.
bug-bite.flavor: The user attacks by biting the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

electroweb.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.
electroweb.flavor: The user captures opposing Pokémon in an electric net to inflict damage. This also lowers their Speed stats.

harden.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.
harden.flavor: The user stiffens all the muscles in its body to boost its Defense stat.

gust.effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Pokémon in the air.
gust.flavor: A gust of wind is whipped up by wings and launched at the target to inflict damage.

whirlwind.effect: Immediately ends wild battles.  Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.
whirlwind.flavor: The target is blown away, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

supersonic.flavor: The user generates odd sound waves from its body that confuse the target.

psybeam.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
psybeam.flavor: The target is attacked with a peculiar ray. This may also confuse the target.

stun-spore.flavor: The user scatters a cloud of numbing powder that paralyzes the target.

psychic.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
psychic.flavor: The target is hit with a strong telekinetic force to inflict damage. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

teleport.effect: Immediately ends wild battles.  No effect otherwise.
teleport.flavor: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting, if any. If a wild Pokémon uses this move, it flees.

dream-eater.effect: Only works on sleeping Pokémon.  Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
dream-eater.flavor: The user eats the dreams of a sleeping target. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

psywave.effect: Inflicts damage between 50% and 150% of the user’s level.
psywave.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

thief.flavor: The user attacks and steals the target's held item simultaneously. The user can't steal anything if it already holds an item.

nightmare.effect: Target loses 1/4 its max HP every turn as long as it’s asleep.
nightmare.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

baton-pass.effect: Allows the trainer to switch out the user and pass effects along to its replacement.
baton-pass.flavor: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting and passes along any stat changes.

morning-sun.effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.  Affected by weather.
morning-sun.flavor: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

psych-up.effect: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.
psych-up.flavor: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the target.

shadow-ball.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
shadow-ball.flavor: The user attacks by hurling a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

skill-swap.flavor: The user employs its psychic power to exchange Abilities with the target.

silver-wind.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise all of the user’s stats by one stage.
silver-wind.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

u-turn.effect: User must switch out after attacking.
u-turn.flavor: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

bug-buzz.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
bug-buzz.flavor: The user vibrates to generate a damaging sound wave. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

rage-powder.effect: Redirects the target’s single-target effects to the user for this turn.
rage-powder.flavor: The user scatters a cloud of irritating powder to draw attention to itself. Opposing Pokémon aim only at the user.

quiver-dance.effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by one stage each.
quiver-dance.flavor: The user lightly performs a beautiful, mystic dance. This boosts the user's Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.

struggle-bug.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
struggle-bug.flavor: The user attacks by struggling against opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Sp. Atk stats.

draining-kiss.effect: Drains 75% of the damage inflicted to heal the user.
draining-kiss.flavor: The user steals the target's HP with a kiss. The user's HP is restored by over half the damage taken by the target.

infestation.effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
infestation.flavor: The target is infested and attacked for four to five turns. The target can't flee during this time.

pollen-puff.effect: Damages opponents, but heals allies for 50% of their max HP.
pollen-puff.flavor: The user attacks the enemy with a pollen puff that explodes. If the target is an ally, it gives the ally a pollen puff that restores its HP instead.

poison-sting.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
poison-sting.flavor: The user stabs the target with a poisonous stinger to inflict damage. This may also poison the target.

fury-attack.flavor: The user attacks by jabbing the target with a horn, a beak, or the like. This move hits two to five times in a row.

twineedle.effect: Hits twice in the same turn.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
twineedle.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

pin-missile.flavor: The user attacks by shooting sharp spikes at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

peck.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
peck.flavor: The target is jabbed with a sharply pointed beak or horn to inflict damage.

agility.effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.
agility.flavor: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. This sharply boosts its Speed stat.

focus-energy.effect: Increases the user’s chance to score a critical hit.
focus-energy.flavor: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that its future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits.

pursuit.effect: Has double power against, and can hit, Pokémon attempting to switch out.
pursuit.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

endeavor.effect: Lowers the target’s HP to equal the user’s.
endeavor.flavor: The user inflicts damage by cutting down the target's HP to roughly equal the user's HP.

payback.effect: Power is doubled if the target has already moved this turn.
payback.flavor: The user stores power, then attacks. This move's power is doubled if the user moves after the target.

assurance.effect: Power is doubled if the target has already received damage this turn.
assurance.flavor: This move's power is doubled if the target has already taken some damage in the same turn.

toxic-spikes.effect: Scatters poisoned spikes, poisoning opposing Pokémon that switch in.
toxic-spikes.flavor: The user lays a trap of poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will poison opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

x-scissor.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
x-scissor.flavor: The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes, claws, or the like as if they were a pair of scissors.

drill-run.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
drill-run.flavor: The user crashes into the target while rotating its body like a drill. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

fell-stinger.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages if it KOs the target.
fell-stinger.flavor: When the user knocks out a target with this move, the user's Attack stat is boosted drastically.

laser-focus.effect: Guarantees a critical hit with the user’s next move.
laser-focus.flavor: The user concentrates intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.

throat-chop.effect: Prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.
throat-chop.flavor: The user attacks the target's throat, and the resultant suffering prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.

sand-attack.effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.
sand-attack.flavor: Sand is hurled in the target's face, lowering the target's accuracy.

quick-attack.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
quick-attack.flavor: The user lunges at the target to inflict damage, moving at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

mirror-move.effect: Uses the target’s last used move.
mirror-move.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

sky-attack.effect: User charges for one turn before attacking.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
sky-attack.flavor: The user attacks the turn after using this move. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit and may also make the target flinch.

feint-attack.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

detect.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.
detect.flavor: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

uproar.effect: Forced to use this move for several turns.  Pokémon cannot fall asleep in that time.
uproar.flavor: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. During that time, no Pokémon can fall asleep.

feather-dance.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by two stages.
feather-dance.flavor: The user covers the target's body with a mass of down that harshly lowers its Attack stat.

pluck.effect: If target has a berry, inflicts double damage and uses the berry.
pluck.flavor: The user attacks by pecking the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

brave-bird.effect: User receives 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.
brave-bird.flavor: The user tucks in its wings and charges at a low altitude. This also damages the user quite a lot.

thunderbolt.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
thunderbolt.flavor: The user attacks the target with a strong electric blast. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

thunder-wave.flavor: The user launches a weak jolt of electricity that paralyzes the target.

thunder.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
thunder.flavor: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

screech.effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by two stages.
screech.flavor: An earsplitting screech harshly lowers the target's Defense stat.

hyper-fang.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
hyper-fang.flavor: The user bites hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. This may also make the target flinch.

super-fang.effect: Inflicts damage equal to half the target’s HP.
super-fang.flavor: The user chomps hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. This cuts the target's HP in half.

flame-wheel.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.  Lets frozen Pokémon thaw themselves.
flame-wheel.flavor: The user attacks by cloaking itself in fire and charging at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

reversal.effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.
reversal.flavor: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

taunt.effect: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.
taunt.flavor: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

revenge.effect: Inflicts double damage if the user takes damage before attacking this turn.
revenge.flavor: This attack move’s power is doubled if the user has been hurt by the opponent in the same turn.

covet.flavor: The user endearingly approaches the target, then steals the target's held item.

shock-wave.flavor: The user strikes the target with a quick jolt of electricity. This attack never misses.

me-first.effect: Uses the target’s move against it before it attacks, with power increased by half.
me-first.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

last-resort.effect: Can only be used after all of the user’s other moves have been used.
last-resort.flavor: This move can be used only after the user has used all the other moves it knows in the battle.

sucker-punch.effect: Only works if the target is about to use a damaging move.
sucker-punch.flavor: This move enables the user to attack first. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

charge-beam.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user’s Special Attack by one stage.
charge-beam.flavor: The user attacks the target with an electric charge. The residual electricity may also boost the user's Sp. Atk stat.

retaliate.effect: Has double power if a friendly Pokémon fainted last turn.
retaliate.flavor: The user takes revenge for a fainted ally. This move's power is boosted if an ally fainted in the previous turn.

final-gambit.effect: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s remaining HP.  User faints.
final-gambit.flavor: The user risks everything to attack the target. The user faints but inflicts damage equal to its own HP.

wild-charge.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
wild-charge.flavor: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its target. This also damages the user a little.

drill-peck.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
drill-peck.flavor: A corkscrewing attack that strikes the target with a sharp beak acting as a drill.

tri-attack.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.
tri-attack.flavor: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam attack. This may also burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

astonish.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
astonish.flavor: The user attacks the target by crying out in a startling fashion. This may also make the target flinch.

slam.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
slam.flavor: The target is slammed with a long tail, vines, or the like to inflict damage.

wrap.effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
wrap.flavor: A long body, vines, or the like are used to wrap and squeeze the target for four to five turns.

disable.effect: Disables the target’s last used move for 1-8 turns.
disable.flavor: For four turns, the target will be unable to use whichever move it last used.

acid.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
acid.flavor: Opposing Pokémon are attacked with a spray of harsh acid. This may also lower their Sp. Def stats.

glare.flavor: The user intimidates the target with the pattern on its belly to cause paralysis.

leech-life.effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
leech-life.flavor: The user drains the target's blood. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

spite.effect: Lowers the PP of the target’s last used move by 4.
spite.flavor: The user unleashes its grudge on the move last used by the target by cutting 4 PP from it.

stockpile.effect: Stores energy up to three times for use with Spit Up and Swallow.
stockpile.flavor: The user stores power and boosts its Defense and Sp. Def stats. This move can be used up to three times.

spit-up.effect: Power is 100 times the amount of energy Stockpiled.
spit-up.flavor: The power stored using the move Stockpile is released at once in an attack. The more power is stored, the greater the move's power.

swallow.effect: Recovers 1/4 HP after one Stockpile, 1/2 HP after two Stockpiles, or full HP after three Stockpiles.
swallow.flavor: The power stored using the move Stockpile is absorbed by the user to restore its own HP. The more power is stored, the more HP is restored.

torment.effect: Prevents the target from using the same move twice in a row.
torment.flavor: The user torments and enrages the target, making it incapable of using the same move twice in a row.

snatch.effect: Steals the target’s move, if it’s self-targeted.
snatch.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

poison-fang.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to badly poison the target.
poison-fang.flavor: The user bites the target with toxic fangs. This may also leave the target badly poisoned.

poison-tail.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit and a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
poison-tail.flavor: The user hits the target with its tail. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit and may also poison the target.

gastro-acid.effect: Nullifies target’s ability until it leaves battle.
gastro-acid.flavor: The user hurls up its stomach acids on the target. The fluid eliminates the effect of the target's Ability.

switcheroo.flavor: The user trades held items with the target faster than the eye can follow.

mud-bomb.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
mud-bomb.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

gunk-shot.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
gunk-shot.flavor: The user shoots filthy garbage at the target to attack. This may also poison the target.

sludge-wave.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
sludge-wave.flavor: The user strikes everything around it by swamping the area with a giant sludge wave. This may also poison those it hits.

coil.effect: Raises the user’s Attack, Defense, and accuracy by one stage each.
coil.flavor: The user coils up and concentrates. This boosts its Attack and Defense stats as well as its accuracy.

snarl.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
snarl.flavor: The user yells as if it's ranting about something, which lowers the Sp. Atk stats of opposing Pokémon.

belch.effect: Can only be used after the user has eaten a berry.
belch.flavor: The user lets out a damaging belch at the target. The user must eat a held Berry to use this move.

psychic-fangs.flavor: The user attacks by biting the target with its psychic capabilities. This move can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

skitter-smack.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
skitter-smack.flavor: The user skitters behind the target to attack. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

lash-out.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
lash-out.flavor: The user lashes out to vent its frustration toward the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's stats were lowered during this turn.

pain-split.effect: Sets the user’s and targets’s HP to the average of their current HP.
pain-split.flavor: The user adds its HP to the target's HP, then equally splits the combined HP between the target and itself.

thunder-fang.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target and a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
thunder-fang.flavor: The user bites with electrified fangs. This may also make the target flinch or leave it with paralysis.

ice-fang.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target and a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
ice-fang.flavor: The user bites with cold-infused fangs. This may also make the target flinch or leave it frozen.

pay-day.effect: Scatters money on the ground worth five times the user’s level.
pay-day.flavor: Coins are hurled at the target to inflict damage. Money is earned after the battle.

double-kick.flavor: The user attacks by kicking the target twice in a row using two feet.

thunder-shock.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
thunder-shock.flavor: The user attacks the target with a jolt of electricity. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

sweet-kiss.flavor: The user kisses the target with a sweet, angelic cuteness that causes confusion.

zap-cannon.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
zap-cannon.flavor: The user attacks by firing an electric blast like a cannon. This also leaves the target with paralysis.

spark.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
spark.flavor: The user attacks the target with an electrically charged tackle. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

encore.effect: Forces the target to repeat its last used move every turn for 2 to 6 turns.
encore.flavor: The user compels the target to keep using the move it encored for three turns.

charge.effect: Raises the user’s Special Defense by one stage.  User’s Electric moves have doubled power next turn.
charge.flavor: The user becomes charged, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move it uses. This also boosts the user's Sp. Def stat.

fake-tears.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.
fake-tears.flavor: The user feigns crying to fluster the target. This harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

volt-tackle.effect: User takes 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
volt-tackle.flavor: The user electrifies itself and charges the target. This also damages the user quite a lot. This attack may leave the target with paralysis.

calm-mind.effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack and Special Defense by one stage.
calm-mind.flavor: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to boost its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

feint.flavor: This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect. This also lifts the effects of those moves.

magnet-rise.effect: User is immune to Ground moves and effects for five turns.
magnet-rise.flavor: The user levitates using electrically generated magnetism for five turns.

nasty-plot.effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack by two stages.
nasty-plot.flavor: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

discharge.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
discharge.flavor: The user strikes everything around it by letting loose a flare of electricity. This may also leave those hit by the attack with paralysis.

electro-ball.effect: Power is higher when the user has greater Speed than the target, up to a maximum of 150.
electro-ball.flavor: The user hurls an electric orb at the target. The faster the user is than the target, the greater the move's power.

volt-switch.effect: User must switch out after attacking.
volt-switch.flavor: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

disarming-voice.flavor: Letting out a charming cry, the user does emotional damage to opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

play-rough.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.
play-rough.flavor: The user attacks by playing rough with the target. This may also lower the target's Attack stat.

play-nice.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
play-nice.flavor: The user and the target become friends, and the target loses its will to fight. This lowers the target's Attack stat.

eerie-impulse.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by two stages.
eerie-impulse.flavor: The user's body generates an eerie impulse. Exposing the target to it harshly lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

electric-terrain.effect: For five turns, prevents all Pokémon on the ground from sleeping and strengthens their electric moves to 1.5× their power.
electric-terrain.flavor: The user turns the ground into Electric Terrain for five turns, powering up Electric-type moves. Pokémon on the ground can no longer fall asleep.

nuzzle.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
nuzzle.flavor: The user attacks by nuzzling its electrified cheeks against the target. This also leaves the target with paralysis.

rising-voltage.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
rising-voltage.flavor: The user attacks with electricity rising from the ground. This move's power is doubled if the target is on Electric Terrain.

alluring-voice.flavor: The user attacks the target using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.

upper-hand.flavor: The user reacts to the target's movement and strikes with the heel of its palm, making the target flinch. This move fails if the target is not readying a priority move.

speed-swap.effect: Exchanges the user’s Speed with the target’s.
speed-swap.flavor: The user exchanges Speed stats with the target.

low-kick.effect: Inflicts more damage to heavier targets, with a maximum of 120 power.
low-kick.flavor: A powerful low kick that makes the target fall over. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

spikes.effect: Scatters Spikes, hurting opposing Pokémon that switch in.
spikes.flavor: The user lays a trap of spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will damage opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

magnitude.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

crush-claw.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
crush-claw.flavor: The user slashes the target with hard and sharp claws. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

sand-tomb.effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
sand-tomb.flavor: The user traps the target inside a harshly raging sandstorm that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

night-slash.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
night-slash.flavor: The user slashes the target the instant an opportunity arises. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

stone-edge.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
stone-edge.flavor: The user stabs the target with sharpened stones. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

stealth-rock.effect: Causes damage when opposing Pokémon switch in.
stealth-rock.flavor: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the opposing team. The trap damages opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

chip-away.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

rototiller.effect: Raises the Attack and Special Attack of all grass Pokémon in battle.
rototiller.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

high-horsepower.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
high-horsepower.flavor: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.

steel-roller.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
steel-roller.flavor: The user attacks while destroying the terrain. This move fails if the ground hasn't turned into a terrain.

flatter.effect: Raises the target’s Special Attack by one stage and confuses the target.
flatter.flavor: Flattery is used to confuse the target. However, this also boosts the target's Sp. Atk stat.

venom-drench.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by one stage if it is poisoned.
venom-drench.flavor: Opposing Pokémon are drenched in an odd poisonous liquid. This lowers the Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats of a poisoned target.

horn-drill.flavor: The user stabs the target with a horn that rotates like a drill. The target faints instantly if this attack hits.

superpower.effect: Lowers the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
superpower.flavor: The user attacks the target with great power. This also lowers the user's Attack and Defense stats.

rock-blast.flavor: The user attacks by hurling hard rocks at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

hex.effect: Has double power if the target has a major status ailment.
hex.flavor: This relentless attack does massive damage to a target affected by status conditions.

quash.effect: Makes the target act last this turn.
quash.flavor: The user suppresses the target and makes its move go last.

horn-attack.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
horn-attack.flavor: The target is jabbed with a sharply pointed horn to inflict damage.

thrash.effect: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.
thrash.flavor: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

head-smash.effect: User receives 1/2 the damage inflicted in recoil.
head-smash.flavor: The user attacks the target with a hazardous full-power headbutt. This also damages the user terribly.

smart-strike.flavor: The user stabs the target with a sharp horn. This attack never misses.

megahorn.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
megahorn.flavor: Using its tough and impressive horn, the user rams into the target with no letup.

pound.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
pound.flavor: The target is physically pounded with a long tail, a foreleg, or the like.

double-slap.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

sing.flavor: A soothing lullaby is sung in a beautiful voice that puts the target to sleep.

night-shade.effect: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.
night-shade.flavor: The user makes the target see a frightening mirage. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

minimize.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by two stages.
minimize.flavor: The user compresses its body to make itself look smaller, which sharply boosts its evasiveness.

metronome.effect: Randomly selects and uses any move in the game.
metronome.flavor: The user waggles a finger and stimulates its brain into randomly using nearly any move.

soft-boiled.effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.
soft-boiled.flavor: The user restores its own HP by up to half its max HP.

splash.flavor: The user just flops and splashes around to no effect at all...

heal-bell.effect: Cures the entire party of major status effects.
heal-bell.flavor: The user makes a soothing bell chime to cure the status conditions of all its fellow party Pokémon and allies.

present.effect: Randomly inflicts damage with power from 40 to 120 or heals the target for 1/4 its max HP.
present.flavor: The user attacks by giving the target a gift with a hidden trap. The gift restores HP sometimes, however.

moonlight.effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.  Affected by weather.
moonlight.flavor: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

follow-me.effect: Redirects the target’s single-target effects to the user for this turn.
follow-me.flavor: The user draws attention to itself, making all opposing Pokémon take aim only at the user.

trick.flavor: The user catches the target off guard and swaps the target's held item with its own.

role-play.flavor: The user mimics the target completely, copying the target's Ability.

wish.effect: User will recover half its max HP at the end of the next turn.
wish.flavor: One turn after this move is used, the user's or its replacement's HP is restored by up to half the user's max HP.

magic-coat.effect: Reflects back the first effect move used on the user this turn.
magic-coat.flavor: Moves like Leech Seed and moves that inflict status conditions are blocked by a barrier and reflected back to the user of those moves.

recycle.effect: User recovers the item it last used up.
recycle.flavor: The user recycles a held item that has been used in battle so it can be used again.

imprison.effect: Prevents the target from using any moves that the user also knows.
imprison.flavor: If opposing Pokémon know any move also known by the user, they are prevented from using it.

hyper-voice.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
hyper-voice.flavor: The user attacks by letting loose a horribly loud, resounding cry.

meteor-mash.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user’s Attack by one stage.
meteor-mash.flavor: The target is hit with a hard punch fired like a meteor. This may also boost the user’s Attack stat.

tickle.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Defense by one stage.
tickle.flavor: The user tickles the target into laughing, lowering its Attack and Defense stats.

cosmic-power.effect: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage.
cosmic-power.flavor: The user absorbs a mystical power from space to boost its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

bounce.effect: User bounces high into the air, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.
bounce.flavor: The user bounces up high on the first turn, then drops onto the target on the next turn. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

gravity.effect: Disables moves and immunities that involve flying or levitating for five turns.
gravity.flavor: Enables Flying types or Pokémon with the Levitate Ability to be hit by Ground-type moves for five turns. Moves that involve flying can't be used.

wake-up-slap.effect: If the target is asleep, has double power and wakes it up.
wake-up-slap.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

healing-wish.effect: User faints.  Its replacement has its HP fully restored and any major status effect removed.
healing-wish.flavor: The user faints. In return, the Pokémon taking its place will have its HP restored and status conditions cured.

lucky-chant.effect: Prevents the target from scoring critical hits for five turns.
lucky-chant.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

copycat.effect: Uses the target’s last used move.
copycat.flavor: The user mimics the move used immediately before it. The move fails if no other move has been used yet.

drain-punch.effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
drain-punch.flavor: The user attacks with an energy-draining punch. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

wonder-room.effect: All Pokémon’s Defense and Special Defense are swapped for 5 turns.
wonder-room.flavor: The user creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon's Defense and Sp. Def stats are swapped for five turns.

psyshock.effect: Inflicts damage based on the target’s Defense, not Special Defense.
psyshock.flavor: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This move deals physical damage.

telekinesis.effect: Moves have 100% accuracy against the target for three turns.
telekinesis.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

after-you.effect: Makes the target act next this turn.
after-you.flavor: The user helps the target and makes it use its move right after the user.

stored-power.effect: Power is higher the more the user’s stats have been raised, to a maximum of 31×.
stored-power.flavor: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the user's stats are boosted, the greater the move's power.

ally-switch.effect: User switches places with the friendly Pokémon opposite it.
ally-switch.flavor: The user teleports using a strange power and switches places with one of its allies. This move's chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

heal-pulse.effect: Heals the target for half its max HP.
heal-pulse.flavor: The user emits a healing pulse that restores the target's HP by up to half its max HP.

bestow.effect: Gives the user’s held item to the target.
bestow.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

misty-terrain.effect: For five turns, protects all Pokémon on the ground from major status ailments and confusion, and halves the power of incoming dragon moves.
misty-terrain.flavor: This protects Pokémon on the ground from status conditions and halves damage from Dragon-type moves for five turns.

fairy-wind.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
fairy-wind.flavor: The user attacks by stirring up a fairy wind to strike the target.

moonblast.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
moonblast.flavor: Borrowing the power of the moon, the user attacks the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Atk stat.

dazzling-gleam.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
dazzling-gleam.flavor: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.

baby-doll-eyes.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
baby-doll-eyes.flavor: The user stares at the target with its baby-doll eyes, which lowers the target's Attack stat. This move always goes first.

spotlight.effect: Forces the target’s opponents to aim at the target for the rest of the turn.
spotlight.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

meteor-beam.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
meteor-beam.flavor: The user gathers energy from space and boosts its Sp. Atk stat on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.

misty-explosion.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
misty-explosion.flavor: The user attacks everything around it and faints upon using this move. This move's power is boosted on Misty Terrain.

future-sight.effect: Hits the target two turns later.
future-sight.flavor: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.

hypnosis.flavor: The user employs hypnotic suggestion to make the target fall asleep.

confuse-ray.flavor: The target is exposed to a sinister ray that causes confusion.

memento.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by two stages.  User faints.
memento.flavor: The user faints. In return, the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats are harshly lowered.

grudge.effect: If the user faints this turn, the PP of the move that fainted it drops to 0.
grudge.flavor: If the user faints, the user’s grudge fully depletes the PP of the opponent’s move that knocked it out.

extrasensory.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
extrasensory.flavor: The user attacks with an odd, unseeable power. This may also make the target flinch.

howl.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.
howl.flavor: The user howls loudly to rouse itself and its allies. This boosts their Attack stats.

power-swap.effect: User swaps Attack and Special Attack changes with the target.
power-swap.flavor: The user employs its psychic power to switch changes to its Attack and Sp. Atk stats with the target.

foul-play.effect: Calculates damage with the target’s attacking stat.
foul-play.flavor: The user turns the target's strength against it. The higher the target's Attack stat, the greater the damage this move inflicts.

tail-slap.flavor: The user attacks by striking the target with its hard tail. This move hits two to five times in a row.

burning-jealousy.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
burning-jealousy.flavor: The user attacks with energy from jealousy. This leaves all opposing Pokémon that have had their stats boosted during the turn with a burn.

self-destruct.flavor: The user attacks everything around it by causing an explosion. The user faints upon using this move.

psychic-noise.flavor: The user attacks the target with unpleasant sound waves. For two turns, the target is prevented from recovering HP through moves, Abilities, or held items.

magic-room.effect: Negates held items for five turns.
magic-room.flavor: The user creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon's held items lose their effects for five turns.

expanding-force.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
expanding-force.flavor: The user attacks the target with its psychic power. When the ground is Psychic Terrain, this move's power is boosted and it damages all opposing Pokémon.

absorb.effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
absorb.flavor: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

mean-look.effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.
mean-look.flavor: The user pins the target with a dark, arresting look. The target becomes unable to flee.

cross-poison.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit and a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
cross-poison.flavor: A slashing attack with a poisonous blade that may also poison the target. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

quick-guard.effect: Prevents any priority moves from hitting friendly Pokémon this turn.
quick-guard.flavor: The user protects itself and its allies from priority moves.

teeter-dance.flavor: The user performs a wobbly dance that confuses every Pokémon around it.

strength-sap.effect: Heals the user by the target’s current Attack stat and lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
strength-sap.flavor: The user restores its own HP by the same amount as the target's Attack stat. It then lowers the target's Attack stat.

aromatherapy.effect: Cures the entire party of major status effects.
aromatherapy.flavor: This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

solar-blade.effect: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.
solar-blade.flavor: The user gathers light on the first turn, then fills a blade with the light's energy and attacks on the next turn.

corrosive-gas.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
corrosive-gas.flavor: The user surrounds everything around it with highly acidic gas and melts away items they hold.

spore.flavor: The user scatters bursts of spores that induce sleep.

wide-guard.effect: Prevents any multi-target moves from hitting friendly Pokémon this turn.
wide-guard.flavor: The user and its allies are protected from wide-ranging attacks for one turn.

lunge.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.
lunge.flavor: The user makes a lunge at the target, attacking with full force. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

pounce.flavor: The user attacks by pouncing on the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

assist.effect: Randomly selects and uses one of the trainer’s other Pokémon’s moves.
assist.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

odor-sleuth.effect: Forces the target to have no Evade, and allows it to be hit by Normal and Fighting moves even if it’s a Ghost.
odor-sleuth.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

punishment.effect: Power increases against targets with more raised stats, up to a maximum of 200.
punishment.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

power-gem.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
power-gem.flavor: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.

embargo.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
