dragon-ascent.effect: Lowers the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
dragon-ascent.flavor: The user attacks the target by dropping out of the sky at high speed. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats.

doom-desire.effect: Hits the target two turns later.
doom-desire.flavor: This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

attack-order.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
attack-order.flavor: The user calls out its underlings to pummel the target. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

defend-order.effect: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage.
defend-order.flavor: The user calls out its underlings to shield its body, boosting its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

heal-order.effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.
heal-order.flavor: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

aromatic-mist.effect: Raises a selected ally’s Special Defense by one stage.
aromatic-mist.flavor: The user boosts the Sp. Def stat of an ally Pokémon by using a mysterious aroma.

chatter.effect: Has a higher chance to confuse the target when the recorded sound is louder.
chatter.flavor: The user attacks the target with sound waves of deafening chatter. This confuses the target.

parting-shot.effect: Lowers all targets’ Attack and Special Attack by one stage.  Makes the user switch out.
parting-shot.flavor: With a parting threat, the user lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats. Then it switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

rock-wrecker.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
rock-wrecker.flavor: The user launches a huge boulder at the target to attack. The user can't move on the next turn.

sacred-sword.flavor: The user attacks by slicing with a sword. The target's stat changes don't affect the damage inflicted by this move.

aqua-cutter.flavor: The user expels pressurized water to cut at the target like a blade. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

mystical-power.flavor: The user attacks by emitting a mysterious power. This also boosts the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

roar-of-time.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
roar-of-time.flavor: The user blasts the target with power that distorts even time. The user can't move on the next turn.

spacial-rend.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
spacial-rend.flavor: The user tears the target along with the space around it. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

magma-storm.effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
magma-storm.flavor: The user traps the target inside a maelstrom of fire that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

crush-grip.effect: Power increases against targets with more HP remaining, up to a maximum of 121 power.
crush-grip.flavor: The target is crushed with great force. The more HP the target has left, the greater the move's power.

shadow-force.effect: User vanishes, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.  Hits through Protect and Detect.
shadow-force.flavor: The user disappears on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn. This move hits even if the target protects itself.

lunar-dance.effect: User faints, and its replacement is fully healed.
lunar-dance.flavor: The user faints. In return, the Pokémon taking its place will have its HP and PP restored and its status conditions cured.

lunar-blessing.flavor: The user receives a blessing from the crescent moon, restoring HP and curing status conditions for itself and its ally Pokémon currently in the battle.

take-heart.flavor: The user lifts its spirits, curing its own status conditions and boosting its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

heart-swap.effect: User and target swap stat changes.
heart-swap.flavor: The user employs its psychic power to switch stat changes with the target.

dark-void.flavor: Opposing Pokémon are dragged into a world of total darkness that puts them to sleep.

seed-flare.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by two stages.
seed-flare.flavor: The user emits a shock wave from its body to attack its target. This may also harshly lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

judgment.effect: If the user is holding a appropriate plate or drive, the damage inflicted will match it.
judgment.flavor: The user releases countless shots of light at the target. This move's type changes depending on the kind of plate held by the user.

searing-shot.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
searing-shot.flavor: The user torches everything around it in an inferno of scarlet flames. This may also leave those it hits with a burn.

v-create.effect: Lowers the user’s Defense, Special Defense, and Speed by one stage each.
v-create.flavor: With a hot flame on its forehead, the user hurls itself at its target. This lowers the user’s Defense, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.

mat-block.effect: Protects all friendly Pokémon from damaging moves.  Only works on the first turn after the user is sent out.
mat-block.flavor: Using a pulled-up mat as a shield, the user protects itself and its allies from damaging moves. This does not stop status moves.

night-daze.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
night-daze.flavor: The user looses a pitch-black shock wave at the target to inflict damage. This may also lower the target's accuracy.

horn-leech.effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
horn-leech.flavor: The user drains the target's energy with its horns. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

shift-gear.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage and its Speed by two stages.
shift-gear.flavor: The user rotates its gears, boosting its Attack stat and sharply boosting its Speed stat.

gear-grind.flavor: The user attacks by throwing steel gears at its target twice.

gear-up.effect: Raises the Attack and Special Attack of all friendly Pokémon with plus or minus by one stage.
gear-up.flavor: The user engages its gears to raise the Attack and Sp. Atk stats of ally Pokémon with the Plus or Minus Ability.

water-shuriken.flavor: The user hits the target with throwing stars two to five times in a row. This move always goes first.

head-charge.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
head-charge.flavor: The user charges its head into its target, using its powerful guard hair. This also damages the user a little.

fire-lash.effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
fire-lash.flavor: The user strikes the target with a burning lash. This also lowers the target's Defense stat.

fiery-dance.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user’s Special Attack by one stage.
fiery-dance.flavor: Cloaked in flames, the user attacks the target by dancing and flapping its wings. This may also boost the user's Sp. Atk stat.

bleakwind-storm.flavor: The user attacks with savagely cold winds that cause both body and spirit to tremble. This may also lower the Speed stats of opposing Pokémon.

wildbolt-storm.flavor: The user summons a thunderous tempest and savagely attacks with lightning and wind. This may also leave opposing Pokémon with paralysis.

blue-flare.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
blue-flare.flavor: The user attacks by engulfing the target in an intense, yet beautiful, blue flame. This may also leave the target with a burn.

fusion-flare.effect: With Fusion Bolt, inflicts double damage.
fusion-flare.flavor: The user brings down a giant flame. This move's power is boosted when influenced by an enormous lightning bolt.

bolt-strike.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
bolt-strike.flavor: The user surrounds itself with a great amount of electricity and charges the target. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

fusion-bolt.effect: With Fusion Flare, inflicts double damage.
fusion-bolt.flavor: The user throws down a giant lightning bolt. This move's power is boosted when influenced by an enormous flame.

sandsear-storm.flavor: The user attacks by wrapping opposing Pokémon in fierce winds and searingly hot sand. This may also leave them with a burn.

glaciate.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.
glaciate.flavor: The user attacks by blowing freezing cold air at opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Speed stats.

secret-sword.effect: Inflicts damage based on the target’s Defense, not Special Defense.
secret-sword.flavor: The user cuts with its long horn. The odd power contained in the horn deals physical damage to the target.

relic-song.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to put the target to sleep.
relic-song.flavor: The user sings an ancient song and attacks by appealing to the hearts of the listening opposing Pokémon. This may also induce sleep.

techno-blast.effect: If the user is holding a appropriate plate or drive, the damage inflicted will match it.
techno-blast.flavor: The user fires a beam of light at its target. The move’s type changes depending on the Drive the user holds.

powder.effect: Explodes if the target uses a fire move this turn, damaging it for 1/4 its max HP and preventing the move.
powder.flavor: The user covers the target in a combustible powder. If the target uses a Fire-type move, the powder explodes and damages the target.

kings-shield.effect: Blocks damaging attacks and lowers attacking Pokémon’s Attack by two stages on contact.  Switches Aegislash to Shield Forme.
kings-shield.flavor: The user takes a defensive stance while it protects itself from damage. It also lowers the Attack stat of any attacker that makes direct contact.

topsy-turvy.flavor: All stat changes affecting the target turn topsy-turvy and become the opposite of what they were.

parabolic-charge.effect: Heals the user for half the total damage dealt to all targets.
parabolic-charge.flavor: The user attacks everything around it. The user's HP is restored by half the damage taken by those hit.

electrify.effect: Changes the target’s move’s type to electric if it hasn’t moved yet this turn.
electrify.flavor: If the target is electrified before it uses a move during that turn, the target’s move becomes Electric type.

flying-press.effect: Deals both fighting and flying-type damage.
flying-press.flavor: The user dives down onto the target from the sky. This move is Fighting and Flying type simultaneously.

shelter.flavor: The user makes its skin as hard as an iron shield, sharply boosting its Defense stat.

fairy-lock.effect: Prevents all Pokémon from fleeing or switching out during the next turn.
fairy-lock.flavor: By locking down the battlefield, the user keeps all Pokémon from fleeing during the next turn.

forests-curse.effect: Adds grass to the target’s types.
forests-curse.flavor: The user puts a forest curse on the target. This adds Grass type to the target's type.

branch-poke.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
branch-poke.flavor: The user attacks the target by poking it with a sharply pointed branch.

trick-or-treat.effect: Adds ghost to the target’s types.
trick-or-treat.flavor: The user takes the target trick-or-treating. This adds Ghost type to the target’s type.

geomancy.effect: Takes one turn to charge, then raises the user’s Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by two stages.
geomancy.flavor: The user absorbs energy and sharply raises its Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats on the next turn.

oblivion-wing.effect: Drains 75% of the damage inflicted to heal the user.
oblivion-wing.flavor: The user absorbs its target’s HP. The user’s HP is restored by over half of the damage taken by the target.

thousand-arrows.effect: Grounds the target, and hits even Flying-type or levitating Pokémon.
thousand-arrows.flavor: This move also hits opposing Pokémon that are in the air. Those Pokémon are knocked down to the ground.

thousand-waves.effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.
thousand-waves.flavor: The user attacks with a wave that crawls along the ground. Those it hits can’t flee from battle.

lands-wrath.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
lands-wrath.flavor: The user gathers the energy of the land and focuses that power on opposing Pokémon to damage them.

core-enforcer.effect: Nullifies the target’s ability if it moves earlier.
core-enforcer.flavor: If the Pokémon the user has inflicted damage on have already used their moves, this move eliminates the effect of the target’s Ability.

diamond-storm.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user’s Defense by two stages for each target hit.
diamond-storm.flavor: The user whips up a storm of diamonds to damage opposing Pokémon. This may also sharply boost the user's Defense stat.

hyperspace-hole.flavor: Using a hyperspace hole, the user appears right next to the target and strikes. This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect.

steam-eruption.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
steam-eruption.flavor: The user immerses the target in superheated steam. This may also leave the target with a burn.

spirit-shackle.flavor: The user attacks while simultaneously stitching the target's shadow to the ground to prevent the target from fleeing.

beak-blast.effect: Inflicts a burn on any Pokémon that makes contact before the attack.
beak-blast.flavor: The user first heats up its beak, and then it attacks the target. Making direct contact with the user while it's heating up its beak results in a burn.

ice-hammer.effect: Lowers user’s Speed by one stage.
ice-hammer.flavor: The user swings its strong, heavy fist at the target to inflict damage. This also lowers the user's Speed stat.

revelation-dance.effect: Has the same type as the user.
revelation-dance.flavor: The user attacks the target by dancing with all its might. This move becomes the same type as the user's type.

accelerock.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
accelerock.flavor: The user smashes into the target at high speed. This move always goes first.

baneful-bunker.effect: Grants the user protection for the rest of the turn and poisons any Pokémon that tries to use a contact move on it.
baneful-bunker.flavor: In addition to protecting the user from attacks, this move also poisons any attacker that makes direct contact.

trop-kick.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.
trop-kick.flavor: The user lands an intense kick of tropical origins on the target. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

floral-healing.effect: Heals the target for ½ its max HP, or ⅔ on Grassy Terrain.
floral-healing.flavor: The user restores the target's HP by up to half its max HP. More HP is restored when the ground is Grassy Terrain.

instruct.effect: Forces the target to repeat its last used move.
instruct.flavor: The user instructs the target to reuse the move last used by the target.

shore-up.effect: Heals the user for ½ its max HP, or ⅔ during a sandstorm.
shore-up.flavor: The user restores its own HP by up to half its max HP. It regains more HP in a sandstorm.

purify.effect: Cures the target of a major status ailment and heals the user for 50% of its max HP.
purify.flavor: The user heals the target’s status condition. If the move succeeds, it also restores the user’s own HP.

multi-attack.effect: If the user is holding a appropriate plate or drive, the damage inflicted will match it.
multi-attack.flavor: Cloaking itself in high energy, the user slams into the target. The memory held determines the move’s type.

shell-trap.effect: Only inflicts damage if the user was hit by a physical move this turn.
shell-trap.flavor: The user sets a shell trap. If the user is hit by a physical move, the trap will explode and inflict damage on opposing Pokémon.

zing-zap.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
zing-zap.flavor: The user crashes into the target, delivering a powerful electric shock. This may also make the target flinch.

anchor-shot.flavor: The user entangles the target with its anchor chain while attacking. The target becomes unable to flee.

clanging-scales.effect: Lowers the user’s Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
clanging-scales.flavor: The user rubs the scales on its entire body and makes a huge noise to attack opposing Pokémon. The user's Defense stat is lowered after the attack.

clangorous-soul.flavor: The user boosts all its stats by using some of its own HP.

natures-madness.effect: Inflicts damage equal to half the target’s HP.
natures-madness.flavor: The user hits the target with the force of nature. It halves the target’s HP.

sunsteel-strike.flavor: The user slams into the target with the force of a meteor. This move can be used on the target regardless of its Ability.

moongeist-beam.flavor: The user emits a sinister ray to attack the target. This move can be used on the target regardless of its Ability.

prismatic-laser.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
prismatic-laser.flavor: The user shoots powerful lasers using the power of a prism. The user can't move on the next turn.

photon-geyser.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
photon-geyser.flavor: The user attacks the target with a pillar of light. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

fleur-cannon.effect: Lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.
fleur-cannon.flavor: The user unleashes a strong beam. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

spectral-thief.effect: Steals the target’s stat increases, then inflicts damage.
spectral-thief.flavor: The user hides in the target’s shadow, steals the target’s stat boosts, and then attacks.

mind-blown.effect: Inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP, rounded up.
mind-blown.flavor: The user attacks everything around it by causing its own head to explode. This also damages the user.

plasma-fists.effect: After inflicting damage, causes all Normal-type moves to become Electric-type for the remainder of the turn.
plasma-fists.flavor: The user attacks with electrically charged fists. This move changes Normal-type moves to Electric-type moves.

double-iron-bash.flavor: The user rotates, centering the hex nut in its chest, and then strikes with its arms twice in a row. This may also make the target flinch.

drum-beating.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
drum-beating.flavor: The user plays its drum, controlling the drum's roots to attack the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

court-change.flavor: With its mysterious power, the user swaps the effects on either side of the field.

pyro-ball.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
pyro-ball.flavor: The user attacks by igniting a small stone and launching it as a fiery ball at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

snipe-shot.effect: Sets Reflect on the user’s side of the field after inflicting damage.
snipe-shot.flavor: The user ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon's moves and Abilities that draw in moves, allowing this move to hit the chosen target.

jaw-lock.effect: Seeds the target after inflicting damage.
jaw-lock.flavor: This move prevents the user and the target from switching out until either of them faints. The effect goes away if either of the Pokémon leaves the field.

tar-shot.flavor: The user pours sticky tar over the target, lowering the target's Speed stat. The target becomes weaker to Fire-type moves.

grav-apple.effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
grav-apple.flavor: The user inflicts damage by dropping an apple from high above. This also lowers the target's Defense stat.

apple-acid.flavor: The user attacks the target with an acidic liquid created from tart apples. This also lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

overdrive.flavor: The user attacks opposing Pokémon by twanging a guitar or bass guitar, causing a huge echo and strong vibration.

octolock.flavor: The user locks the target in and prevents it from fleeing. This move also lowers the target’s Defense and Sp. Def every turn.

teatime.flavor: The user has teatime with all the Pokémon currently in the battle. Each Pokémon eats its held Berry.

magic-powder.flavor: The user scatters a cloud of magic powder that changes the target's type to Psychic.

false-surrender.flavor: The user pretends to bow its head, but then it stabs the target with its disheveled hair. This attack never misses.

spirit-break.effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
spirit-break.flavor: The user attacks the target with so much force that it could break the target's spirit. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

obstruct.flavor: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession. Direct contact harshly lowers the attacker’s Defense stat.

meteor-assault.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
meteor-assault.flavor: The user attacks wildly with its thick leek. The user can’t move on the next turn, because the force of this move makes it stagger.

decorate.flavor: The user sharply boosts the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats by decorating the target.

no-retreat.effect: Hits twice in one turn, with a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
no-retreat.flavor: This move boosts all the user's stats but prevents the user from switching out or fleeing.

aura-wheel.flavor: Morpeko attacks and boosts its Speed stat with the energy stored in its cheeks. This move's type changes depending on the user's form.

bolt-beak.flavor: The user stabs the target with its electrified beak. If the user attacks before the target, the power of this move is doubled.

fishious-rend.flavor: The user rends the target with its hard gills. If the user attacks before the target, the power of this move is doubled.

dragon-darts.flavor: The user attacks twice using Dreepy. If there are two opposing Pokémon, this move hits each of them once.

dynamax-cannon.effect: Sets Light Screen on the user’s side of the field after inflicting damage.
dynamax-cannon.flavor: The user condenses energy within its body and unleashes that energy from its core to inflict damage.

eternabeam.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
eternabeam.flavor: This is Eternatus’s most powerful attack in its original form. The user can’t move on the next turn.

wicked-blow.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
wicked-blow.flavor: The user, having mastered the Dark style, strikes the target with a fierce blow. This move always lands a critical hit.

jungle-healing.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
jungle-healing.flavor: The user becomes one with the jungle, restoring HP and curing status conditions for itself and its ally Pokémon currently in the battle.

thunder-cage.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
thunder-cage.flavor: The user traps the target inside a cage of sparking electricity that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

dragon-energy.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
dragon-energy.flavor: Converting its life-force into power, the user attacks opposing Pokémon. The lower the user's HP, the lower the move's power.

stone-axe.flavor: The user swings its stone axes at the target. Stone splinters left behind by this attack float around the target.

last-respects.flavor: The user attacks to avenge its allies. The more defeated allies there are in the user's party, the greater the move's power.

dire-claw.flavor: The user lashes out at the target with ruinous claws. This may also leave the target poisoned, paralyzed, or asleep.

springtide-storm.flavor: The user attacks by wrapping opposing Pokémon in fierce winds brimming with love and hate. This may also lower their Attack stats.

flower-trick.flavor: The user throws a rigged bouquet of flowers at the target. This attack never misses and always lands a critical hit.

torch-song.flavor: The user blows out raging flames as if singing a song, scorching the target. This also boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

aqua-step.flavor: The user toys with the target and attacks it using light and fluid dance steps. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.

silk-trap.flavor: The user spins a silken trap, protecting itself from damage while lowering the Speed stat of any attacker that makes direct contact.

revival-blessing.flavor: The user bestows a loving blessing, reviving a party Pokémon that has fainted and restoring half that Pokémon's max HP.

double-shock.flavor: The user discharges all the electricity from its body to perform a high-damage attack. After using this move, the user will no longer be Electric type.

population-bomb.flavor: The user’s fellows gather in droves to perform a combo attack that hits the target one to ten times in a row.

salt-cure.flavor: The user salt cures the target, inflicting damage every turn. Steel and Water types are more strongly affected by this move.

armor-cannon.flavor: The user shoots its own armor out as blazing projectiles. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.

bitter-blade.flavor: The user focuses its bitter feelings toward the world of the living into a slashing attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

doodle.flavor: The user captures the very essence of the target in a sketch. This changes the Abilities of the user and its ally Pokémon to that of the target.

spicy-extract.flavor: The user emits an incredibly spicy extract, sharply boosting the target's Attack stat and harshly lowering the target's Defense stat.

lumina-crash.flavor: The user attacks by unleashing a peculiar light that even affects the mind. This also harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

gigaton-hammer.flavor: The user swings its whole body around to attack with its huge hammer. This move can't be used twice in a row.

triple-dive.flavor: The user performs a perfectly timed triple dive, hitting the target with splashes of water three times in a row.

jet-punch.flavor: The user summons a torrent around its fist and punches at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

spin-out.flavor: The user spins furiously by straining its legs, inflicting damage on the target. This also harshly lowers the user's Speed stat.

mortal-spin.flavor: The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also poisons opposing Pokémon.

fillet-away.flavor: The user sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats by using its own HP.

order-up.flavor: The user attacks with elegant poise. If the user has a Tatsugiri in its mouth, this move boosts one of the user's stats based on the Tatsugiri's form.

kowtow-cleave.flavor: The user slashes at the target after kowtowing to make the target let down its guard. This attack never misses.

glaive-rush.flavor: The user throws its entire body into a reckless charge. After this move is used, attacks on the user cannot miss and will inflict double damage until the user’s next turn.

make-it-rain.flavor: The user attacks by throwing out a mass of coins. This also lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat. Money is earned after the battle.

ruination.flavor: The user summons a ruinous disaster. This cuts the target’s HP in half.

collision-course.flavor: The user transforms and crashes to the ground, causing a massive prehistoric explosion. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it’s a supereffective hit.

electro-drift.flavor: The user races forward at ultrafast speeds, piercing its target with futuristic electricity. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it's a supereffective hit.

hydro-steam.flavor: The user blasts the target with boiling-hot water. This move's power is not lowered in harsh sunlight but rather boosted by 50 percent.

psyblade.flavor: The user rends the target with an ethereal blade. This move's power is boosted by 50 percent if the user is on Electric Terrain.

syrup-bomb.flavor: The user sets off an explosion of sticky candy syrup, which coats the target and causes the target's Speed stat to drop each turn for three turns.

matcha-gotcha.flavor: The user fires a blast of tea that it mixed. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

ivy-cudgel.flavor: The user strikes with an ivy-wrapped cudgel. This move's type changes depending on the mask worn by the user, and it has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

electro-shot.flavor: The user gathers electricity on the first turn, boosting its Sp. Atk stat, then fires a high-voltage shot on the next turn. The shot will be fired immediately in rain.

fickle-beam.flavor: The user shoots a beam of light to inflict damage. Sometimes all the user's heads shoot beams in unison, doubling the move's power.

burning-bulwark.flavor: The user's intensely hot fur protects it from attacks and also burns any attacker that makes direct contact with it.

thunderclap.flavor: This move enables the user to attack first with a jolt of electricity. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

mighty-cleave.flavor: The user wields the light that has accumulated atop its head to cleave the target. This move hits even if the target protects itself.

tachyon-cutter.flavor: The user attacks by launching particle blades at the target twice in a row. This attack never misses.

tera-starstorm.flavor: With the power of its crystals, the user bombards and eliminates the target. When used by Terapagos in its Stellar Form, this move damages all opposing Pokémon.

malignant-chain.flavor: The user pours toxins into the target by wrapping them in a toxic, corrosive chain. This may also leave the target badly poisoned.
